title: senecio glandulosolanosus
intro: Senecio glandulosolanosus, also known as the glandular leafed ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio glandulosolanosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Senecio glandulosolanosus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or inflorescence, with the dried leaves and flowers being commonly used in herbal medicine.
